name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month, missed renewals cause lost commissions. We automate renewal tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking insurance policy renewals and notifying clients in a timely manner.
